name: AI Music Random
description: V3 procedural music generator for MakeCode Arcade. 39 blocks: melodies, chords, rhythms, arpeggios, basslines, drum patterns, fanfares, ambient, solos, call-and-response, song codes, AI prompt generation (LM Studio/OpenAI/Anthropic), 11 scales, 8 visualizer styles, song styles, articulation, transposition, and more.
